articles.author: Collin Woodard
articles.title: Chevy Corvette ZR1 Sets Car And Driver's New Lightning Lap Record, Beats McLaren Senna By 0.7 Seconds - Jalopnik
articles.description: This isn't one of those, "Sure it's quick in a straight line, but what about corners?" conversations that people normally have about cheap American performance.
articles.content: "Some automakers have described their sportiest vehicles as 'race cars for the road,' but McLaren makes them all liars," Car and Driverwrote back in 2019, describing the ridiculously track-capable Mc… [+1405 chars]
